steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The passage uses the phrase "revealing important details about the time in which KNM-KP 271 lived." The blank must mean something like shed light on or clarify the Pliocene epoch.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean clarify or shed light on the Pliocene epoch. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘imitate’: to copy or mimic — paleoanthropologists want to learn about the epoch, not copy it. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘design’: to plan or create — the epoch already existed; the fossil can't design it. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘illuminate’: to shed light on or clarify — revealing important details about a time period is precisely illuminating it. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘substitute’: to replace something with something else — the fossil replaces nothing here. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
